other_observers: Coen Dexter, Brenda Wright, Maria Rodriguez, Jason Beason, Robin Nicholoff, Vic Zerbi
description: Singing full song for at least 4 days. I heard odd song before I determined that a Scarlet Tanager was in my yard and that song could have been this bird, therefore, it could have been in my yard more than 4 days. Obvious identification; red bird with black wings. Song matched recordings that I listened.
